title: dactylorhiza majalis subsp. praetermissa
intro: Dactylorhiza majalis subsp. praetermissa, also known as the Sand-leaved Autumn Lady's Tresses, is a type of orchid that belongs to the genus Dactylorhiza. This perennial plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with Dactylorhiza majalis subsp. praetermissa include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as dried root, tincture, and infusion, which can be used to treat various health issues.
